title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that choosing the right programming language is critical for AI teams, particularly as they scale. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI coding because static typing, LSP support, and compile-time checks catch errors earlier and reduce runtime mistakes, especially important when AI systems are involved in code generation.
